categories.title: Poster
categories.description: Strategies for planning, reviewing, and exporting poster deliverables.

categories.description: Strategies for planning, reviewing, and exporting presentation deliverables.

capabilities.title: Format-Neutral Planning
capabilities.description: Plan deliverables independently from file-format rendering adapters.

constraints.title: Brand, Accessibility, and Export
constraints.description: Require explicit branding, accessibility, data, review, and export constraints.
